title: Five things a godly man builds in private
caption:
The man you become is built where no one's watching.

Most guys spend their 20s building a profile instead of a person — optimizing for how they look before they've decided who they are.

A man walking with God works different.

He prays before the day runs him. He trains the body because stewardship starts there. He gets good at something hard — not for the brand — because useful men are rare. He shows up when it's inconvenient, because that's where character gets cut. And he builds a reputation only God knows yet — because who you are in private is exactly who you'll be when the whole world is watching.

"Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much." — Luke 16:10.

The work is invisible. The man isn't.

—
